name: Cream Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, salt, cream of tartar, and baking soda together.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add the cream (or half-and-half) and mix until a dough forms.
4. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/2 inch thickness.
5. Cut into biscuits using a 2-inch cutter.
6. Place the biscuits onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a hot oven (400°F) for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
